description: Tests whether the skill fires on the right prompts and stays quiet on the wrong ones.

evals.prompt: Implement the timing improvement in Connection_removeConnInfo — merge the isInConnList pre-check into the removal loop to eliminate the redundant full traversal of connectionConnList
evals.why: 'Implement' is a request for moficiation — preflight must verify the reordering doesn't introduce a race or access a freed  + resource before the check completes.

evals.prompt: How should I implement the retry logic in BLE_RadioIRQHandler? I want it to retry once on allocation failure.
evals.why: 'How should I implement' is a planning phrase that precedes writing.

evals.prompt: Modify connection_close to return the connection handle on success instead of 0.
evals.why: Direct 'modify function' request — must run preflight before editing.

evals.prompt: Change adc_raw_to_mv to use uint32_t for the intermediate multiplication so it doesn't overflow.
evals.why: 'Change function' — even though the fix is known, preflight should confirm no new risks.

evals.prompt: Make clock_setup faster. The prescaler write and the enable write are two separate bus transactions — can we merge them?
evals.why: Performance optimization with a specific mechanism — preflight checks execution fit.

evals.prompt: I need to reduce the execution time of Connection_assessConnQuality. It's on the BLE event path and costs too many cycles.
evals.why: Latency reduction on a hot-path function — preflight needed before any edit.

evals.prompt: Write a function that computes the exponential moving average of RSSI samples for the connection quality module.
evals.why: 'Write a function' — new logic, needs CFI/arithmetic/resource checks before writing.

evals.prompt: Implement a stats_reset function in packet_counter.c that zeroes all counters atomically.
evals.why: 'Implement a function' — new function with atomicity requirement, preflight for ordering.

evals.prompt: Add a timeout guard to adc_batch_average so it returns 0 and sets an error flag if count is 0.
evals.why: Adding a guard to an existing function — preflight checks the new control-flow path.

evals.prompt: Add error logging to BLE_RadioIRQHandler when ble_pdu_alloc fails — we need to track allocation failures.
evals.why: Adding a call inside an ISR — preflight checks call graph (logging from IRQ context is risky).

evals.prompt: Add a retry parameter to connection_find so callers can request up to N retries on a failed lookup.
evals.why: Signature change + new loop logic — preflight checks recursion and arithmetic.

evals.prompt: Split clock_setup into two functions: one that programs the prescaler and one that waits for oscillator lock.
evals.why: Splitting a function changes call graph ordering — preflight must check both halves.

evals.prompt: Extract the clamping logic from Connection_assessConnQuality into a private inline clamp helper.
evals.why: Extracting a helper introduces a new function — preflight checks it.

evals.prompt: Inline connection_find into connection_close — it's only called from one place and the call overhead matters.
evals.why: Inlining removes an abstraction boundary — preflight checks the merged control flow.

evals.prompt: Fix the unsigned subtraction wrap in stats_update — if byte_count overflows uint16_t the summary value goes wrong.
evals.why: Bug fix in arithmetic path — preflight confirms the fix doesn't introduce a new risk.

evals.prompt: Fix the potential double-free in BLE_RadioIRQHandler — s_rx_buf can be read after it's freed in the TX branch.
evals.why: Use-after-free fix — preflight maps the new ownership explicitly before any edit.

evals.prompt: Add a const qualifier to the samples pointer in adc_batch_average — the function doesn't modify the array.
evals.why: Signature change — preflight checks for callers that may be passing non-const pointers.

evals.prompt: Change the return type of stats_update from uint16_t to uint32_t to avoid the truncation issue.
evals.why: Return type change is an ABI change — preflight must check all callers.

evals.prompt: Replace the linear scan in connection_find with a hash table lookup. Keep the same signature.
evals.why: Algorithmic replacement — new data structure and control flow, preflight needed.

evals.prompt: Port adc_raw_to_mv to use the hardware FPU — replace the integer division with a float multiply.
evals.why: Porting to a different execution unit — arithmetic range and calling convention risks.

evals.prompt: Wrap connection_close with a critical section so it's safe to call from interrupt context.
evals.why: Adding synchronisation around an existing function — preflight checks call graph from IRQ.

evals.prompt: Add RAII ownership to the rx buffer in BLE_RadioIRQHandler instead of manual free calls.
evals.why: Introducing RAII changes resource lifetime paths — preflight maps the new ownership.

evals.prompt: Merge adc_raw_to_mv and adc_batch_average into a single adc_read_mv that reads, averages, and converts in one call.
evals.why: Merging two functions — combined arithmetic and resource surface needs preflight.

evals.prompt: Add an on_complete callback parameter to clock_setup so callers can register a handler for oscillator-ready.
evals.why: Adding a callback introduces an indirect call edge — preflight checks CFI and re-entrancy.

evals.prompt: Change the quality score formula in Connection_assessConnQuality to use a weighted sum instead of subtraction.
evals.why: Arithmetic formula change — preflight checks new range and overflow risk.

evals.prompt: What does clock_setup do? Walk me through the prescaler calculation.
evals.why: Read-only understanding request — no code will be written, skill should stay quiet.

evals.prompt: Explain how BLE_RadioIRQHandler handles the TX_DONE event.
evals.why: Explanation only — no change planned.

evals.prompt: Show me the full body of connection_find.
evals.why: File read, not a code change.

evals.prompt: Review Connection_assessConnQuality for potential bugs. Don't change anything yet — just tell me what you find.
evals.why: 'Don't change anything' is explicit — this is analysis mode, not planning mode.

evals.prompt: Is adc_raw_to_mv safe to call with vref_mv = 5000? I'm not asking you to change it, just check.
evals.why: Safety analysis without change intent — preflight would be premature.

evals.prompt: Build the BLE project and run the unit tests.
evals.why: Build and test execution — no function change planned.

evals.prompt: Compile clock_setup.c with -O2 and show me the generated assembly.
evals.why: Compile and inspect — reading the output, not writing new code.

evals.prompt: Find all callers of connection_find in the BLE project.
evals.why: Search/navigation — no code change involved.

evals.prompt: List all functions defined in conn_manager.c.
evals.why: File exploration — no edit intent.

evals.prompt: Update the Makefile to add -Wall to the compiler flags.
evals.why: Makefile edit — no function body is being written.

evals.prompt: Add a #define CLOCK_PRESCALER_DEFAULT 5 to clock_regs.h.
evals.why: Adding a constant to a header — no function logic involved.

evals.prompt: Add a comment above the prescaler line in clock_setup explaining why we divide by 5.
evals.why: Comment-only edit — no logic change, preflight not needed.

evals.prompt: Commit the changes to clock_setup.c with a message about the prescaler fix.
evals.why: Git operation — not a code change.

evals.prompt: Use LOCI to measure the current execution time of clock_setup without changing anything.
evals.why: Profiling/measurement request — read-only use of LOCI, no edit planned.

evals.prompt: Generate Doxygen documentation for the functions in conn_manager.c.
evals.why: Documentation generation only — no code logic change.
